title: RoseResourcepack
description: Automatic Hosting, Protection, and Merging for Your Resourcepacks.
body:
---

✨ WHY CHOOSE ROSERP?

RoseRP is a plugin for the effortless management of resource packs in Minecraft. It allows you to zip a resource pack using the **`/roserp zip`** command and automatically host it on the server, eliminating the need to manually host files on cloud storage like Dropbox or Google Drive. Simply use **`/roserp texture`** to apply the server-generated resource pack to players instantly! ---

⚡ PLUGIN FEATURES

* **Auto-Hosting:** Hosts the resource pack directly on your server. * **Multi-Version:** Seamless compatibility with multiple versions. * **Integrations:** Works with BetterHUD, ItemsAdder, Oraxen, and more. * **Security:** Protects resource packs from being unpacked. * **Optimization:** Asynchronous resource pack building & Automatic SHA1 hash generation. * **Delivery:** Automatic delivery to players on login. Supports multiple packs per player (1.20.3+) and forced installation (1.17+). * **Customization:** Displays custom messages on the prompt screen and allows resetting via command. ---

🛠️ HOW IT WORKS & SETUP

**How Does Resource Pack Hosting Work?** The plugin sets up a small, dedicated web server on a different port to host the resource packs. This bypasses common cloud-storage limits and saves time. Running this web server does **not** impact your server’s performance. **How to Upload a Resource Pack:** * **Place the contents:** Copy your resource pack files and folders into the designated folder on your server. * **Customize configuration:** Open *config.yml* and ensure the resource pack folder name matches the one specified in the config. * **Apply:** Use the plugin commands to package and apply your resource pack! **Configuration Instructions:** Open a port (e.g., **8443**) on your server for the resource pack. You can consult your hosting provider for guidance. Enter this open port in the plugin configuration. *Note: Changing the port requires a full server restart (reloading the plugin is not enough).* ---

⚙️ REQUIREMENTS

* Supported Versions: **1.8 to 26.1.2** * Java Version: **Java 8** or newer ---

🗺️ ROADMAP

* WorldGuard flags support * Forced installation with player kick * Resource pack obfuscation * BungeeCord / Velocity support * Auth plugin support ---

🎥 VIDEO TUTORIAL
